predictedBugs: Any file within src/artifacts/ that is imported from outside and was missed in the grep scan would break at runtime
If src/kernel/artifacts/validator.ts has a typo in the re-export path (../validators vs ../validators) it would cause a module resolution failure
If feature-complete.ts checks validateTestPlan but the old validator.ts only exports 4 functions and the kernel validator matches, no diff — low risk
edgeCases: Empty src/artifacts/ directory after removal — no files should remain
Case sensitivity in import paths on Linux vs Windows
JSON/JS config files in tool-configs that might be loaded dynamically with require()
